title: စဓ ဗဝ ဂါထာ

content.burmese: စဓ ဗဝ ဂါထာ — ကောင်းချီးဂါထာ
ဗုဒ္ဓေါ လောကေ သမုပ္ပန္နော၊ ဟိတာယ သဗ္ဗပါဏိနံ။ စက္ခုံ လောကေ ပတိဋ္ဌာပေ၊ ဟိတာယ သဗ္ဗပါဏိနံ။
content.romanization: Buddho loke samuppanno, hitāya sabbapāṇinaṃ. Cakkhuṃ loke patiṭṭhāpe, hitāya sabbapāṇinaṃ
content.translation: The Buddha has arisen in the world for the welfare of all beings. The Eye has been established in the world for the welfare of all beings

content.burmese: ဓမ္မော လောကေ သမုပ္ပန္နော၊ သုခါယ သဗ္ဗပါဏိနံ။ ဝိနယော လောကေ ပတိဋ္ဌာပေ၊ သုခါယ သဗ္ဗပါဏိနံ။
content.romanization: Dhammo loke samuppanno, sukhāya sabbapāṇinaṃ. Vinayo loke patiṭṭhāpe, sukhāya sabbapāṇinaṃ
content.translation: The Dhamma has arisen in the world for the happiness of all beings. The Discipline has been established in the world for the happiness of all beings

content.burmese: သံဃော လောကေ သမုပ္ပန္နော၊ ပုညက္ခေတ္တံ အနုတ္တရံ။ ပဋိဂ္ဂဟေတွာ ပုညက္ခေတ္တံ၊ ဧဝံ ဟောတု သုမင်္ဂလံ။
content.romanization: Saṅgho loke samuppanno, puññakkhettaṃ anuttaraṃ. Paṭiggahetvā puññakkhettaṃ, evaṃ hotu sumaṅgalaṃ
content.translation: The Sangha has arisen in the world as the incomparable field of merit. Having accepted this field of merit, may there be great blessings
